    Called when the user taps the Accept button on an invitation row.

    Verifies that the hosting
    invalid reference 
    android.app.Activity
    implements FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener and retains a reference to it.
    onBackPressed() - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileSettingsActivity
    Intercepts the back button to enforce mandatory profile completion in first-run mode.
    onBindViewHolder(CancelledEntrantsAdapter.ViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsAdapter
    Binds data from the entrant at the given position to the CancelledEntrantsAdapter.ViewHolder.
    onBindViewHolder(EventAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventAdapter
    Binds the Event at position to holder.
    onBindViewHolder(ExploreEventAdapter.ExploreViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ExploreEventAdapter
    Binds the Event at the given position to the provided ExploreEventAdapter.ExploreViewHolder.
    onBindViewHolder(InvitedEntrantsAdapter.EntrantViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    Binds the entrant at position to holder.
    onBindViewHolder(OrganizerEventAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.OrganizerEventAdapter
    Binds the Event at position to holder.
    onCancelRequested(InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsActivity
    Called by the adapter when the organizer presses Cancel on a Pending entrant.
    onCancelRequested(InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter.CancelListener
    Called when the organizer taps the Cancel button for a Pending entrant.
    onCardClick(Event) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener
    Called when the user taps anywhere on an invitation row outside the Accept and Decline buttons, typically to view event details.
    onCreate() - Method in class com.example.codebase.MyApp
    Called when the application process is starting, before any app components (excluding content providers) have been created.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.BrowseEventsActivity
    Called when the activity is created.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsActivity
    Called when the activity is created.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventActivity
    Initialises the activity, restores or pre-populates ViewModel state from intent extras, sets up the ViewPager2 wizard adapter, and wires navigation button listeners.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EntrantEventDetailActivity
    Initialises the activity, resolves the event ID and device ID, binds views, wires button listeners, and triggers the initial Firestore load.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventDetailActivity
    Initialises the activity, binds all views, wires click listeners for every action row and card, and triggers the initial Firestore load.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventDetailsActivity
    Initialises the activity, binds views, validates the "eventId" intent extra, and triggers the Firestore load via EventDetailsActivity.loadEvent(String).
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ExplorePageActivity
    Initialises the activity, binds views, configures the invitation card and RecyclerView with their respective click listeners, and triggers the initial data load.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitationsActivity
    Initialises the activity, binds views, configures the RecyclerView and its adapter, and triggers the initial invitation load from Firestore.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsActivity
    Initialises the activity, binds views, wires tab and back-button listeners, sets up the RecyclerView, and triggers the initial Firestore load.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.MainActivity
    Inflates the layout, triggers role sync and notification checks, and wires navigation button click listeners.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.NotificationsActivity
    Initialises the activity, binds views, sets up the invitation card click listener, configures bottom navigation, and triggers the initial data loads.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.OrganizerActivity
    Initialises the activity, resolves the device ID, binds views, sets up the RecyclerView with OrganizerEventAdapter, wires the FAB and bottom navigation, and triggers the initial event load.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileActivity
    Initialises the activity, resolves the current session role, binds all views, configures button listeners, sets up bottom navigation, and triggers the initial profile load.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileSettingsActivity
    Initialises the activity, resolves the operating mode, populates UI views, and triggers an asynchronous profile load from UserRepository.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.QrDisplayActivity
    Inflates the layout, reads intent extras, generates the QR code
    invalid reference 
    Bitmap
    , and wires the share button.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.QRScannerActivity
    Initializes the activity, sets up the cancel button, and starts the camera preview.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.RoleCheckActivity
    Reads registration state and immediately delegates to WelcomeActivity.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.SendNotificationFragment
    Reads SendNotificationFragment.ARG_EVENT_ID and SendNotificationFragment.ARG_EVENT_TITLE from the fragment arguments.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.SplashActivity
    Initialises the splash screen, resolves the device ID, and performs the Firestore new-user check.
    onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.WelcomeActivity
    Initialises the activity, reads the registration state from
    invalid reference 
    SharedPreferences
    , inflates the role-selection UI, and attaches click listeners to the role cards.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout, binds the shared CreateEventViewModel, pre-fills all input fields with any previously saved values, and attaches CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher instances to sync user input back to the ViewModel.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CreateQrFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout and obtains the shared CreateEventViewModel.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CreateScheduleFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout, retrieves the shared CreateEventViewModel, pre-fills all input fields with any previously entered values, and attaches date pickers and a text watcher to the appropriate fields.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CreateSettingsFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout, retrieves the shared CreateEventViewModel, and sets up the settings controls.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventsFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.FinalEntrantListFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout, retrieves event data from the host via FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener.getEvent(), and initializes all views.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.FirstFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.HistoryFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.HomeFragment
    Called to have the fragment instantiate its user interface view.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitationFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout and wires up the accept and decline invitation buttons.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.SecondFragment
    Inflates the fragment layout.
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater, ViewGroup, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.SendNotificationFragment
    Inflates the bottom sheet layout.
    onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsAdapter
    Inflates the item layout and creates a new CancelledEntrantsAdapter.ViewHolder.
    onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventAdapter
    Inflates the item_event layout and wraps it in an EventAdapter.EventViewHolder.
    onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ExploreEventAdapter
    Inflates a new R.layout.item_explore_event row view and wraps it in an ExploreEventAdapter.ExploreViewHolder.
    onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    Inflates the item_invited_entrant layout and wraps it in a new InvitedEntrantsAdapter.EntrantViewHolder.
    onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.OrganizerEventAdapter
    Inflates the item_organizer_event layout and wraps it in an OrganizerEventAdapter.EventViewHolder.
    onDeclineClick(Event) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener
    Called when the user taps the Decline button on an invitation row.
    onDestroy() - Method in class com.example.codebase.QRScannerActivity
    Shuts down the QRScannerActivity.cameraExecutor to release background thread resources when the activity is destroyed.
    onError(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.EventRepository.EventDetailsCallback
    Called when the load operation fails or the event document does not exist.
    onError(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.EventRepository.EventsCallback
    Called when the load operation fails.
    onError(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.UserRepository.ErrorCallback
    Called when an operation fails.
    onError(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.UserRepository.UserCallback
    Called when the load operation fails.
    onEventClick(Event) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Called when the user taps an event card.
    onEventClick(Event) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.OrganizerEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Called when the user taps an event card.
    onEventLoaded(Event) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.EventRepository.EventDetailsCallback
    Called when the requested Event has been successfully loaded.
    onEventsLoaded(List<Event>) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.EventRepository.EventsCallback
    Called when the event list has been successfully loaded.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.CreateQrFragment
    Populates the UI with the event name and QR code once the fragment is visible.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventDetailActivity
    Reloads the event details from Firestore each time the activity resumes, ensuring entrant counts and status badge stay current after returning from sub-screens such as InvitedEntrantsActivity or CancelledEntrantsActivity.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.ExplorePageActivity
    Refreshes both the invitation count and the full events list each time the activity returns to the foreground, ensuring stale data from other screens (e.g.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.NotificationsActivity
    Refreshes the invitation summary and notification list each time the activity returns to the foreground, ensuring data stays current after returning from InvitationsActivity or EntrantEventDetailActivity.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.OrganizerActivity
    Reloads the organizer's event list from Firestore each time the activity resumes, ensuring the list reflects any changes made in CreateEventActivity or EventDetailActivity.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileActivity
    Reloads the user's profile each time the activity returns to the foreground, ensuring edits made in ProfileSettingsActivity are reflected immediately.
    onResume() - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileFragment
    Reloads the user profile each time the fragment becomes visible.
    onUserLoaded(User) - Method in interface com.example.codebase.UserRepository.UserCallback
    Called when the user profile has been successfully loaded.
    onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventsFragment
    Binds views and initiates the cache-first event loading strategy.
    onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.FirstFragment
    Binds the navigation button after the view hierarchy has been created.
    onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.ProfileFragment
    Binds views, populates the device ID, initiates the initial profile load, and attaches the edit profile click listener.
    onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.SecondFragment
    Binds the navigation button after the view hierarchy has been created.
    onViewCreated(View, Bundle) - Method in class com.example.codebase.SendNotificationFragment
    Binds views, wires radio button and button listeners, attaches the character-count
    invalid reference 
    TextWatcher
    , and triggers the initial event data load.
    OrganizerActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    "My Events" screen for the organizer role.
    OrganizerActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.OrganizerActivity
     
    OrganizerEventAdapter - Class in com.example.codebase
    RecyclerView.Adapter for the organizer's "My Events" screen.
    OrganizerEventAdapter(List<Event>, OrganizerEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.OrganizerEventAdapter
    Constructs a new OrganizerEventAdapter.
    OrganizerEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Listener interface for item-tap events on the event list.
